title: kittyWathe
description: An addon for the Harpy Express (Wathe) that adds map switching, voting, and automatic Loose Ends rounds.
body: # kittyWathe kittyWathe is a utility mod for servers that run the Harpy Express. ## Features: - **Multiple maps added through datapacks** - **Map voting before every round** - **Automatic gamemode choices** - *Loose Ends* -> 2-5 people - *Default* (with a customizable chance for Loose Ends) -> 6+ people
